description: The marketing team is receiving an 'Untrusted Host' security warning when accessing the Matomo dashboard via the internal domain `http://analytics.internal.corp`. Resolve this by whitelisting `analytics.internal.corp` in the `trusted_hosts` allowlist within the Matomo configuration file at `/var/www/html/config/config.ini.php`. Ensure that existing trusted hosts, such as `localhost` and `127.0.0.1`, remain in the configuration. You have `sudo` privileges.
